# Inter font source

- Family: Inter
- Upstream: `https://github.com/rsms/inter`
- Release: `v4.1`
- File: `InterVariable.ttf`
- SHA-256: `4989b125924991b90d05b2d16e0e388c48f7d5bb8b30539bbf9c755278d0ccaf`
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (`OFL.txt`)

The checked-in variable font is used only by the offline atlas generator. The
device and emulator never download or parse a font at runtime.
